intents.name: greeting
responses: Welcome to Trivia Bot! Ready for some fun questions? Say 'give me a question'
Hey there! Let's test your knowledge. Ask for a question!
Great! I've got some awesome trivia questions for you.

intents.name: request_question
responses: Which planet is known as the Red Planet? (Hint: Mars, Venus, or Jupiter)
What's the capital of France? (Paris, London, or Berlin)
In what year did the Titanic sink? (1912, 1915, or 1918)

intents.name: answer_correct
responses: 🎉 Correct! Great job! Ready for another?
You got it! Well done! Want another question?
Excellent! You're on fire! Next one?

intents.name: answer_incorrect
responses: Not quite! The correct answer was Mars. Try the next one?
Not this time! It was Paris. Want to try again?
That's not right, but good try! The answer was 1912. Ready for another?
